$comment: Batth Farms REAL fixture: NormalizedMeter[]-shaped, built from the real account-4699664587-8 billing extract (fixtures/extract/batth-real-billing.json) joined to the real 183-meter master inventory (batth-real-inventory.json). The 46 billed meters carry real dollars (printedTotalUsd as summaries[].totalBillUsd, demandChargeUsd as a demand line item); the remaining meters of the 183 are map/metadata-only (empty summaries) until their billing lands. intervals are empty everywhere (no Green Button interval export yet), so the interval-driven levers (rate-compare bucketing, retrospective daily-outlier) honestly no-op on energy and the bill-level signals (demand-charge exposure, bill anomaly) are what these engines can prove today. The non-NormalizedMeter `meta` block carries map pins (lat/long), the billed peakKw, NEM true-up, entity/ranch/status for the dashboard; the energy engines read only serviceId/tariff/summaries/intervals.
